rule_metadata.author: Leandro Ferreira
rule_metadata.title: Xworm Storage of Modules in registry

rules.rule_text:
title: Xworm Storage of Modules in registry
id: 2ce3df91-81c7-4327-92ef-dd748957dbcb
description: Detects Xworm registry operations in relation to the storage of implant
  plugins
status: stable
author: Leandro Ferreira
references:
- https://vx-underground.org/Builders/XWorm/XWorm%20V6.0
- https://thehackernews.com/2025/10/xworm-60-returns-with-35-plugins-and.html
date: 2025-12-12
modified: 2025-12-12
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: registry_set
detection:
  selection:
    TargetObject|re: (?i)Software\\[A-F0-9]{20}\\[A-F0-9]{64}$
    Details: Binary Data
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate applications that so happen to make use of this pattern
level: high
